import os
import pickle
import logging
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import qlib
from qlib.contrib.data.handler import Alpha158
import lightgbm as lgb

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING)

DATA_DIR = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
PROVIDER_URI = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'qlib_data')
WS = '/workspace'
CKPT_DIR = os.path.join(WS, 'checkpoints_v2')
os.makedirs(CKPT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

for f in os.listdir(CKPT_DIR):
    if f.startswith('model_') and f.endswith('.txt'):
        os.remove(os.path.join(CKPT_DIR, f))

qlib.init(provider_uri=PROVIDER_URI, region='cn')

handler = Alpha158(
    start_time='2008-01-01',
    end_time='2021-12-31',
    fit_start_time='2008-01-01',
    fit_end_time='2020-12-31',
    instruments='csi300',
    infer_processors=[
        {'class': 'RobustZScoreNorm', 'kwargs': {'fields_group': 'feature', 'clip_outlier': True}},
        {'class': 'Fillna', 'kwargs': {'fields_group': 'feature'}},
    ],
    learn_processors=[
        {'class': 'DropnaLabel'},
        {'class': 'CSRankNorm', 'kwargs': {'fields_group': 'label'}},
    ],
)

df_train_x = handler.fetch(selector=slice('2008-01-01', '2020-12-31'), data_key='learn', col_set='feature')
df_train_y = handler.fetch(selector=slice('2008-01-01', '2020-12-31'), data_key='learn', col_set='label')
df_valid_x = handler.fetch(selector=slice('2021-01-01', '2021-12-31'), data_key='learn', col_set='feature')
df_valid_y = handler.fetch(selector=slice('2021-01-01', '2021-12-31'), data_key='learn', col_set='label')

print('Train X:', df_train_x.shape, flush=True)

feature_names = list(df_train_x.columns)

x_train = df_train_x.values.astype(np.float32)
y_train = df_train_y.values.astype(np.float32).ravel()
x_valid = df_valid_x.values.astype(np.float32)
y_valid = df_valid_y.values.astype(np.float32).ravel()

m_tr = ~np.isnan(y_train)
m_va = ~np.isnan(y_valid)
x_train, y_train = x_train[m_tr], y_train[m_tr]
x_valid, y_valid = x_valid[m_va], y_valid[m_va]
print('After NaN drop. Train:', x_train.shape, 'Valid:', x_valid.shape, flush=True)

base_params = {
    'objective': 'regression',
    'metric': 'l2',
    'learning_rate': 0.05,
    'num_leaves': 64,
    'feature_fraction': 0.9,
    'bagging_fraction': 0.9,
    'bagging_freq': 5,
    'min_data_in_leaf': 50,
    'verbosity': -1,
    'num_threads': 16,
}

# 12 seeds with same base params
configs = []
for sd in range(12):
    p = dict(base_params)
    p.update({'seed': sd, 'feature_fraction_seed': sd, 'bagging_seed': sd})
    configs.append(p)

# 6 additional seeds with mild variation for diversity
variations = [
    {'num_leaves': 32, 'learning_rate': 0.05},
    {'num_leaves': 128, 'learning_rate': 0.03},
    {'num_leaves': 64, 'learning_rate': 0.03, 'feature_fraction': 0.8},
    {'num_leaves': 96, 'learning_rate': 0.04},
    {'num_leaves': 48, 'learning_rate': 0.05, 'feature_fraction': 0.7},
    {'num_leaves': 64, 'learning_rate': 0.05, 'min_data_in_leaf': 100},
]
for i, var in enumerate(variations):
    sd = 100 + i
    p = dict(base_params)
    p.update(var)
    p.update({'seed': sd, 'feature_fraction_seed': sd, 'bagging_seed': sd})
    configs.append(p)

for i, params in enumerate(configs):
    dtrain = lgb.Dataset(x_train, label=y_train)
    dvalid = lgb.Dataset(x_valid, label=y_valid, reference=dtrain)
    print(f'Training model {i} (seed {params["seed"]})...', flush=True)
    model = lgb.train(
        params,
        dtrain,
        num_boost_round=1000,
        valid_sets=[dvalid],
        callbacks=[lgb.early_stopping(80), lgb.log_evaluation(0)],
    )
    print(f'model {i} best_iter:', model.best_iteration, flush=True)
    model.save_model(os.path.join(CKPT_DIR, f'model_{i}.txt'))

with open(os.path.join(CKPT_DIR, 'feature_names.pkl'), 'wb') as f:
    pickle.dump(feature_names, f)
with open(os.path.join(CKPT_DIR, 'meta.pkl'), 'wb') as f:
    pickle.dump({'n_models': len(configs)}, f)

print('Done.', flush=True)
